data.name: Hentai Fantasy Chicks
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Fantasy Chicks is a casual puzzle game.
Listen to the relaxing music, move around the fragments of the image, and make the full picture.
Explore and enjoy all different types of fantasy girls and relax.

Features

  • Beautiful art of sexy fantasy chicks.
  • Press 'q' to auto complete puzzles.
  • Easy 5x5 puzzles.
  • Progress saved in the gallery.
  • ONE HANDED MODE.
  • Unique art.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor, 2 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 Gb
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 Gb
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
